message:
feat(obligation): Dialectica-style two-phase contract + graded/marking/leak refinements

Introduce obligation/dialectica.rs — a Dialectica-style contract layer
based on Gödel's Dialectica interpretation for two-phase effects. This
allows obligation fulfillment to be expressed as witness/challenge pairs
with formal verification properties.

Supporting changes across existing obligation modules:

graded.rs:
- Move #[must_use] from reserve() to resolve()/into_raw() so callers
  get warnings where they actually consume the obligation token
- Replace verbose if-!resolved-panic with assert!() in both
  GradedObligation::Drop and GradedScope::Drop
- Add #[must_use] to reserve_send()/abort_send() in toy_api
- Switch use super::* to explicit imports

leak_check.rs:
- Consolidate VarState::join() match arms — merge Held/MayHold
  propagation into fewer branches for clarity
- Use Self in Branch variant constructor

marking.rs:
- Remove unused BTreeMap import and obligation_meta HashMap
- Add kind_index() const fn mapping ObligationKind → compact u8 indices
- Add ALL_KINDS const array for exhaustive iteration
- Add #[must_use] to project_trace()

mod.rs:
- Expand module-level documentation
- Register new dialectica sub-module

record/obligation.rs:
- Minor alignment change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
